generation.sheet: requested 2x2, model returned 4x2 variants on solid #FF00FF, raw 1408x768

steps: variant pick: badge = sheet cell (0,0) polished single champagne ring + radial brushed bronze face; button cell = sheet cell (1,3) thin champagne border inside rounded-square dark iron face
defringe pass 1: r>g+40 && b>g+40 -> clamp r<=g+45, b<=g+25
defringe pass 2 (bronze rule): b>g+8 && r>g+8 -> clamp b<=g-4 (kills the purple halo on silhouette edges)
QC: 0 magenta-residual pixels on both plates

states.active: code overlay: champagne ring/border highlight + label brightening (no extra generated art)
states.disabled: code globalAlpha dim (no extra generated art)

intended_use: bottom dock chrome: hud-dock-badge-round for the capital/tasks edge badges (drawn ~76px logical), hud-dock-button-cell for the 4 center square buttons (drawn ~46px logical)
